review_title: Agent Methods is my IT team and Assistant
description: Exceptional and trustworthy from the first marketing webinar I joined.
author: Carol O.
pros: I've found Agent Methods to be reliable over years of using their services. I don't think any other Medicare Website/Resource/Scheduling service could match the care and follow-through.
cons: Sometimes I wish that I could call them, but email response with video instructions for where I'm stuck in my idea comes within hours.

review_title: AgentMethods (AM) offers great websites and services
description: I really enjoy my overall experience with AM and the services they provide
author: Nina W.
pros: I like the ease of setting up my own website, and the Customer Support team is quick and efficient in helping answer any questions I may have, even supplying tutorials on how to complete tasks
cons: I really can't say anything bad about AM!!!

description: Excellent. [sensitive content hidden] were big helps
author: Joe M.
pros: Compliant, easy to change different needs
cons: I have two areas of insurance I specialize in. Medicare and life Insurance. The drop down menus for Medicare were too detailed and could drive a client off my web page. Example. Send to Medicare. Gov.

description: Agent Methods is awesome. Very responsive and willing to make sure it’s working for you the way you need it. They on board in multiple zooms to teach you how to set up, update and use it. They make sure you are seeing the results you need. Very functional and a huge asset to our company. Plus most clients LOVE it! I had one client tell me she just loves receiving emails from me!!
author: Breanna M.
pros: Customization and Functionality. Agent methods did a great job at templates and makes it easy to use and customize to be your own website, emails etc!
cons: I really don’t have any complaints about Agent Methods. But if I had to choose one thing… when setting up the colors of my website I wasn’t able to choose my own palate of colors to match my branding.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Since I've begun working with them, Agent Methods has shown to be totally professional and provides a high-quality service to insurance professionals. It really takes a burden off me.
author: Sandra H.
pros: They are so professional and always available for me if I have questions. In addition to the website, I now also have an automated newsletter that goes to my clients and an automated email to them requesting reviews. Agent Methods has helped me up my marketing game and keep in contact with my clients 24/7/365.
cons: I can’t think of a single thing I dislike about them; Agent Methods is truly wonderful in every way.

review_title: AgentMethods - easy to implement, easy to use
author: Lisa R.
pros: Anytime I have had a question, the folks at AgentMethods were quick to respond and make sure that I got answers!
cons: The "set it and forget it" options really make it TOO easy for me to forget to look things over!

description: I am please with the process from Sales to Support.
author: Margaret C.
pros: The one-on-one meetings with the IT Development Specialist to create the website. The weekly sessions to review design including how to use the dashboard and make design changes.
cons: While I am concerned, that this solution may not be as advantageous for me because I must use other tools that may not integrate with the website created to reap all the benefits that Agent Methods bring to the table.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Looking forward to a long and prosperous partnership.
author: Eric S.
pros: Everyone I have interacted with is so helpful and knowledgable. The platform is simple and straightforward to use.
cons: I can't change some of the border colors to a custom palette. The colors and style are limited to what the platform offers.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Great group! Don't hesitate to call them. They will truly make your website come together quickly
author: Janis S.
pros: Professional Do what they say After you chat with agent methods they always send an email with all what you discussed and the links to do what you need to do LISTEN Such and easy process No Stress Availability
cons: They sent me a gift of cookies. LOL I don't eat cookies. Trying to be fit and healthy
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
